final:
module RefModule(  
    input clk,  
    input reset,  
    input [4:0] audio_in,  
    output reg [4:0] audio_out  
);  
    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin  
        if (reset)  
            audio_out <= 5'b00000;  
        else  
            audio_out <= audio_in >> 1;  
    end  
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
